project_type: Vanilla JS single-page webapp (no bundler), IIFE modules loaded via script tags
build_system: None (static files). Tests run with node directly.
test_framework: Custom assert-style smoke tests using jsdom (smoke.js), engine unit tests (test.js). No test runner framework.
test_command: cd qi-webapp && node smoke.js && node test.js
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'node smoke.js' in qi-webapp/ - must show ALL SMOKE TESTS PASSED (209 assertions). 2. Run 'node test.js' in qi-webapp/ - must show all 7 suite PASS lines.
setup_instructions: cd qi-webapp && npm install (installs jsdom for tests)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET. Node 22.22.3. No build step needed. jsdom required for smoke tests.
contribution_requirements: No free-text/number inputs in data views (click-only rule). Login/register forms are the ONE exception where text inputs for email/password are allowed. Existing 209 smoke tests must pass unchanged. New API integration is opt-in (mode='api'), default remains 'local'.
key_patterns: IIFE modules exposing globals (window.QICalc, window.QIStore, window.QICharts). Store has API object exported as both module.exports and root.QIStore. UI uses RENDER/AFTER maps for each view. Script load order: calc.js -> store.js -> charts.js -> ui.js. Smoke tests inject all scripts into jsdom with runScripts:'dangerously'.
directory_structure: qi-webapp/ - the frontend SPA (index.html + js/ + css/). server/ - the backend with dist/ containing compiled routes. server/dist/auth/routes.js has register/login/logout/me endpoints. server/dist/routes/cases.js has CRUD endpoints.
